basic_details.job_title: IIT Bhilai Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Engineer, Project Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai (IIT Bhilai)
basic_details.post_name: Project Engineer, Project Associate / Embedded System Engineer, Project Assistant (Finance)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai (IIT Bhilai) has released the official Project Positions Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced under the IIT Bhilai Project Positions Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 45 years of age with qualifications such as M.Tech/ME/MS/B.Tech/BE/M.Sc./MCA with relevant experience, B.E./B.Tech./MCA/MBA with 2 years of experience, or B.E./B.Tech./Master's in Commerce/Master of Science with 2 years of experience can apply online on or before 15 June 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules will be applicable as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: MTech/ME/MS/BTech/BE/MSc/MCA with relevant experience, B.E./B.Tech./MCA/MBA with 2 years experience, B.E./B.Tech./Master's in Commerce/Master of Science with 2 years experience
qualification.details: Project Engineer: MTech/ME/MS in Computer Science and Engineering/Information Technology or equivalent with relevant experience, OR B.Tech./ B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering/ Information Technology or equivalent with relevant experience, OR M.Sc. in Computer Science, Information Technology, or equivalent with relevant experience, OR M.C.A. from a recognized University or statutory body with relevant experience. Project Associate / Embedded System Engineer: B.E./B.Tech./MCA/MBA with a minimum of two years of experience in the relevant area. Project Assistant (Finance): B.E./B.Tech. /Master's in Commerce/Master of Science with a minimum of two years of experience in the relevant area.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Bhilai Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Bhilai to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Bhilai Project Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the IIT Bhilai Project Positions is 15th June 2026. Ensure you apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Positions at IIT Bhilai?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for Project Positions at IIT Bhilai. These positions are distributed across different roles like Project Engineer, Project Associate, and Project Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: For the Project Engineer position, candidates need to have an MTech/ME/MS in Computer Science and Engineering/Information Technology or equivalent with relevant experience, or a B.Tech./B.E. in the same fields with relevant experience, or an M.Sc. in Computer Science/Information Technology, or an MCA.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the IIT Bhilai recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for the Project Positions at IIT Bhilai?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Project Positions at IIT Bhilai is 45 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary range for the Project Assistant (Finance) post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Assistant (Finance) post ranges from ₹ 25,000 to ₹ 45,000 per month, depending on qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Positions at IIT Bhilai involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Chhattisgarh apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any domicile restrictions. Candidates from all over India who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these Project Positions at IIT Bhilai is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the links for the official notification PDF and the online application form in the "Important Links" section of this article. The official website of IIT Bhilai is also provided.
